texto: Today the word "hero" has been diminished. confused with "celebrity." But in my father's generation the word meant something. celebrities seek fame. They take actions to get attention. Most often, the actions they take have no particular moral content. Heroes are heroes because they have risked something to help others. Their actions involve courage. Often, those heroes have been indifferent to the public's attention. But at least, the hero could understand the focus of the emotion.
explicacao: Citação de James D. Bradley sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “Today the word "hero" has been diminished. confused with "celebrity." But in my father's generati…” articula familia, celebrity, heroes em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como heroes e insperational.
